coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of how large language models generate text from a prompt

Basic familiarity with assistant products such as Claude and ChatGPT
Capability to test a prompt and compare outputs across attempts

Documentation of prompts that work well and why
Elementary knowledge of model limitations such as hallucination
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with calling a model through an API or SDK
Basic knowledge of embeddings and what they represent
Elementary understanding of tokenization and context length
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Writes effective prompts for simple tasks
Is building foundational prompt engineering skills

coreCompetencies: Capability to design prompts for multi-step tasks with clear structure

Understanding of semantic search over embeddings
indicators: Designs effective prompts with supervision
Improves task quality through prompt iteration
